positive: A dynamic, minimalist illustration of a stylized celestial journey. The main subject is a pair of elegant, silhouetted mountain climbers scaling a jagged, bioluminescent peak under a vibrant nebula sky. The mountains should feature clean, geometric shapes with strong, crisp lines, rendered in deep sapphire, electric violet, and neon turquoise accents. Below the climbers, a stylized crescent moon radiates soft, warm gold and pastel pink light. The composition must be centralized and vertical, emphasizing upward motion and adventure. Style: Flat vector art mixed with ethereal digital painting, high contrast, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Composition: Central, strong vertical lines, clear foreground/background separation.
negative: blur, realistic photo, detailed face, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, grain, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, grayscale
